tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Well, this is my first time posting. I was playing larnsriver's version and 
realized it could be a lot simpler than she made it seem. So here's my version.

Capo on 1st.


[Intro]

[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
  Oh oh oh oh oh oh oh oh[/tab]


[Verse 1]

[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                            [ch]F[/ch]
  Keep drinking coffee, stare me down across the table[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
  While I look outside[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]
  So many things I'd say if only I were able[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]F[/ch]
  But I just keep quiet and count the cars that pass by[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
  You've got opinions man[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]
  We're all entitled to 'em[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]
  But I never asked[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
  So let me thank you for your time[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
  And try not to waste any more of mine[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
  Get out of here fast[/tab]

[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]
  I hate to break it to you babe[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
  But I'm not drowning[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
  There's no one here to save[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
  Who cares if you disagree[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
  You are not me[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
  Who made you king of anything[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
  So you dare tell me who to be[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
  Who died and made you king of anything?[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
  Ooh ooh oh[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
  You sound so innocent[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]
  All full of good intent[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]     
  Swear you know best[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
  But you expect me to[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]
  Jump up on board with you[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
  And ride off into your delusional sunset[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
  I'm not the one who's lost[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]
  With no direction, oh[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
  But you'll never see [/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
  You're so busy making maps[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]
  With my name on them in all caps[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]
  You got the talking down[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]
  Just not the listening[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
  Who cares if you disagree[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
  You are not me[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
  Who made you king of anything[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
  So you dare tell me who to be[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
  Who died and made you king of anything?[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab]     [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]
  All my life I've tried[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
  To make everybody happy while I[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]
  Just hurt and hide[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]F[/ch]
  Waiting for someone to tell me it's my turn to decide[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
  Who cares if you disagree[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
  You are not me[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
  Who made you king of anything[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]F[/ch]
  So you dare tell me who to be[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
  Who died and made you king of anything?[/tab]

[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
  Who cares if you disagree[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]
  You are not me[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]G[/ch]
  Who made you king of anything[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
  So you dare tell me who to be[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
  Who died and made you king of anything[/tab]


[Outro]

[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]F[/ch]  
  Lemme hold your crown, babe[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]
   Oh oh ah ah[/tab]
